description_long: This is a five-tier bookcase featuring a robust black metal frame with a geometric, X-shaped cross-bracing on the back for added stability. Each of the five shelves is constructed from dark-stained wood, providing a warm contrast to the industrial metal structure. The open sides and back design allow for visibility and accessibility from multiple angles, making it suitable for displaying books, decor, or storage bins. The frame is angular, with the top slightly wider than the base, giving it a modern, architectural silhouette. The shelves are evenly spaced and appear sturdy enough to support a moderate load. This bookcase would fit well in urban environments such as lofts, offices, or communal spaces, blending functionality with contemporary style.
description: A five-shelf bookcase with a black metal frame and dark wood shelves, featuring open sides and X-bracing for stability. Its modern, industrial design makes it ideal for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five wooden shelves, the black metal frame, and the X-shaped cross-bracing at the back.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile, the thickness of the shelves, and the depth of the frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full X-bracing and the open structure of the back, with all shelves visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the slim profile and shelf arrangement.
